text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to the office for a meeting with
Mejiro Ardan when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff! S-sorry! Couldja help me out a sec here?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Tamamo. What seems to be the
matter?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's her... She's comin' after me!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, Taaamtaaam! Wherever have you gone?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's her! There's no time to explain, just
lemme in, fast!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whewww! Ya sure saved me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo, are you playing a game of hide and
seek with Creek? Hehe, you certainly are close
friends.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
As if! If ya hadn't stepped in just now, I woulda
been stuck bein' her dolly all day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Dear me... I think I'll let you get your bearings
before I press you for further details.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So, ya see, it all started with Creak winnin' dis
fancy rattle toy from a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: She just had to try it out... so she tried to make me act like some googoo gaga baby doll.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My... so that's what had you feeling so concerned.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
From what I can gather, however... it sounds as
though Creek simply wished to play with you,
Tamamo.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You don't know what she's like, Ardan! I'd like to see you put up with bein' treated like a baby!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, why don't I accompany you? That
would make things less frightening, I assume?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean yeah, maybe, but... real talk, I don't
think I got it in me to see Creek right now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Come now, you're just winded from all the
running. Let's go and speak with Creek once
you've had a chance to rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and lie down here... You can rest your
head on my lap. There's nothing to be afraid of.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: K-kay...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This reminds me of when the young Mejiro
children would get tuckered out and then come
along to my room for an afternoon nap.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I feel as though I've just gained a younger
sister. You're safe here... Sleep tight...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Y-younger... sister?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hold up a sec! You're doin' exactly da same thing
Creek was gonna do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh? Is that how it seems?
choice_data_list: You do give off a big sister vibe.

"Little sister" is still better than "little baby"
though, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nope, I'm not fallin' for it! No one's treatin' me like a kid!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm not outta the woods yet! I gotta get back to
my room!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: W-wait—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Tamtam! ♪ I've been looking everywhere for
you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: GYAAAHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, my...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, a no-holds-barred game of cat and
mouse ensues, with Mejiro Ardan chasing after
them both in an attempt to mediate.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Grrraaahhh! I don't like either of those options, got it?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But fine... I'll take Ardan over Creek for now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's an honor to be your safe haven. Now,
try to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Shall I sing you a lullaby? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gahhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the sound of lullabies fills the office, Tamamo
Cross lies with her head on Mejiro Ardan's lap, a
defeated look on her face.
